name: Dani
description:
under the bleachers

─── ⋆⋅ •⩊• ⋅⋆ ───

Late 2000s | anypov | unpopular x ...? | strangers to lovers

Dani isn't crushing on you - the two of you are classmates!
User isn't coded to be anything specific.

Scenario 1
♡ Location: Mor High - Bleachers
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You catch Nic and a popular girl making out underneath the bleachers. Dani tugs you away and tells you not to say anything.

Scenario 2
♡ Location: Mor High - Gymnasium
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Time for dodgeball... you're on Dani's team. You're being targeted by Clay, one of the jocks. Maybe it's cause you're unpopular, maybe you're popular and he thinks it would be funny (his way of flirting), or maybe you rejected him earlier - it's up to you! Dani notices and catches the ball before hitting Clay in the dick.
(૭  •̀ ᵕ •́  )૭ BEAT EM ALL UP!

Scenario 3
♡ Location: Mor High - Nurse's Office
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Mr. Sharpe notices the self-harm scars on Dani's arms. He gives Dani the option to go to the nurse's office - he uses it as a way to skip the rest of the period. The nurse makes him sit in one of the beds, and he sees you there.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, self-harm, past suicide ideations, estranged/deceased family, physically/emotionally/verbally abusive conservative-minded parents (no longer in the picture)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Downpour
ALT: Defending you, Mall
